exemplar.title: Can new knowledge change established values or beliefs?

detailedExemplarData.title: Can new knowledge change established values or beliefs?

strengths: Clear selection of three specific, well-contextualized real-world objects (Chandrayaan-3 lander, BAPS Swaminarayan Akshardham Temple, ICSE Grade-10 timetable).
Effective use of images and factual grounding to situate each artifact in reality.
Demonstrates awareness of TOK framing (e.g., theme âKnowledge and the knowerâ) and uses personal reflection to add authenticity.
Credible sourcing for artifacts (official ICSE body, recognizable institutional references).
weaknesses: The TOK prompt is never explicitly named; links to ânew knowledge versus established beliefsâ remain implicit.
Justifications rely heavily on generalized assertions (e.g., âmany scientists,â âold age Hindusâ) without concrete evidence or expert testimony.
Analysis is often descriptive rather than interpretive, with little use of TOK terminology (âways of knowing,â âparadigm shiftâ).
Repetitive arguments across artifacts and inconsistent citation format weaken the overall coherence and academic rigor.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets basic requirements by identifying three specific objects and providing contextual facts, earning it a mark above the 3â4 band. Its key strengths lie in the careful selection of artifacts, clear real-world grounding, and authentic personal reflection. However, the commentary lacks depth, explicit engagement with the IA prompt and TOK concepts, and sufficient supporting evidenceâelements necessary to solidly reach the 5â6 band. Given the official examinerâs total of 5 and the relative acuity of strengths versus persistent weaknesses, a final holistic score of 5/10 accurately reflects a borderline performance between basic and competent exhibition standards.

annotations.comment: The student does not explicitly state the chosen IA prompt at the outset, making it difficult to see which prompt is being addressed.
Include an explicit statement of the chosen IA prompt in the introduction to guide the reader and frame the exhibition.
Refine the section title to explicitly reference how Chandrayaan-3 exemplifies the interplay of new knowledge and established beliefs.
The image of the Chandrayaan-3 rover is well chosen and clearly identified, grounding the discussion in a specific real-world object.
The caption âAs can be seen in Figure 1â is purely descriptive; you should analyse what landing on the lunar south pole means for established beliefs.
Claims such as âmany scientistsâ¦ believe landingâ¦ is impossibleâ are unsupported; provide specific studies or expert quotations to substantiate this assertion.
Integrate TOK terminology (e.g., âparadigm shift,â âknowledge frameworksâ) when explaining how this mission challenges established beliefs.
The conclusion for Artifact 1 is broad and could more sharply tie to the IA prompt; clarify precisely how beliefs have been revolutionised.
Specify which belief system is being challenged by the Akshardham Temple and name the stakeholders rather than using the vague term âold age Hindus.â
Selecting a major temple outside India is an effective choice to illustrate how knowledge of Hindu practice manifests globally.
The caption âAs can be seen in Figure 2â again describes rather than interprets; explain what the flourishing attendance signifies for established beliefs.
Analysis of this artifact relies heavily on assumptions; bolster your argument with surveys or interviews showing shifts in belief among diaspora Hindus.
Provide concrete examples or testimonies (e.g., quotes from worshippers) to substantiate claims about belief change in the target audience.
Revise the title of Artifact 3 to emphasise its relevance: for example, âICSE Grade 10 Exams as a Lens on Knowledge and Belief.â
Reproducing the full examination timetable is overly detailed and distracts from your focus on knowledge dynamics.
Summarise key elements of the exam rather than including the entire table to sharpen your analytical focus on belief versus new understanding.
The personal reflection on exam stress adds authenticity and personal knowledge perspective to your analysis.
The personal anecdote is not explicitly tied back to the IA prompt; deepen reflection by linking to TOK concepts such as personal and shared knowledge.
Apply TOK terminology (e.g., âways of knowing,â âpersonal certaintyâ) when discussing how exam experience did or did not alter beliefs.
Citation entries are inconsistent (some lack dates, others follow different styles); adopt a single citation format (APA, MLA, etc.) for clarity.
One URL appears truncated and incomplete; ensure all links are fully copied so sources can be verified.
The standalone entry â119085â is unclear; clarify this reference or remove it if it was included in error.
Including the official ICSE body as a source strengthens credibility by situating your artifact in its institutional context.
Before the works cited, include a concise conclusion summarising how the three artifacts collectively address the IA prompt.
Stating âTHEME: Knowledge and the knowerâ shows awareness of TOK context and frames the exhibition topic effectively.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
